metadata.title: Rollover Daily Todos Helper
metadata.description: Rollover Daily Todos Helper Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Run now
ast.target: 立即运行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run automatic delayed opening of today's daily note on startup
ast.target: 启动时运行自动延迟打开今日每日笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait after startup before opening today's note (0-120)
ast.target: 启动后等待多久再打开今日笔记（0-120）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command ID to open today's daily note. Keep default 'daily-notes' unless you use a custom command.
ast.target: 打开今日每日笔记的命令ID。除非使用自定义命令，否则保持默认的'daily-notes'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If exact command ID is not found, try first command that starts with '<ID>:'
ast.target: 如果未找到确切的命令ID，尝试第一个以'<ID>:'开头的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not run command if today's daily note is already open in any markdown tab
ast.target: 如果今日每日笔记已在任何Markdown标签页中打开，则不运行命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: run rollover command after opening today's note
ast.target: 可选：打开今日笔记后运行滚动命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used only when 'Run rollover after open' is enabled. Example: obsidian-rollover-daily-todos:obsidian-rollover-daily-todos-rollover
ast.target: 仅在启用'打开后运行滚动'时使用。示例：obsidian-rollover-daily-todos:obsidian-rollover-daily-todos-rollover

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show status notifications when command is executed
ast.target: 命令执行时显示状态通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Execute delayed open logic immediately
ast.target: 立即执行延迟打开逻辑

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable delayed opener
ast.target: 启用延迟打开器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay (seconds)
ast.target: 延迟（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Daily note command ID
ast.target: 每日笔记命令 ID

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fallback by prefix
ast.target: 按前缀回退

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Skip if today's note already open
ast.target: 如果今日笔记已打开则跳过

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Run rollover after open
ast.target: 打开后执行滚动

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Rollover command ID
ast.target: 滚动命令 ID

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notice
ast.target: 显示通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Run now
ast.target: 立即运行

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Today's daily note is already open.
ast.target: 今日的每日笔记已经打开了。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily note command not found. Check command ID in plugin settings (default: daily-notes).
ast.target: 未找到每日笔记命令。请在插件设置中检查命令 ID（默认为：daily-notes）。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Run delayed open now
ast.target: 立即运行延迟打开
